TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Paridrayan = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Paridrayan. 229 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 733 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 718 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan 95%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = paɾidɾajan = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ paɾidɾajan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan **%, ɾukai *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Paridrayan = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Paridrayan. 229 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 733 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 718 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan 95%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = paɾidɾajan = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ paɾidɾajan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan **%, ɾukai *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
